ddls:
CREATE TABLE "challenge_response_pairs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge-response pair */,
  "challenge" TEXT /* Challenge value */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response value */,
  "hashkey" TEXT /* Hash key for the challenge-response pair */,
  "expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date and time for the challenge-response pair */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the challenge-response pair */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the challenge-response pair was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the challenge-response pair */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the challenge-response pair was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the challenge-response pair is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_response_pairs_hashkey FOREIGN KEY ("hashkey") REFERENCES hash_keys ("hashkey")
)

CREATE TABLE "hash_keys" (
  "hashkey" TEXT /* Hash key value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hash key */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used to generate the hash key */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt value used to generate the hash key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashkey")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, user, guest) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_response_pair_history" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "challenge_response_pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge-response pair */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., created, updated, expired) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_response_pair_history_challenge_response_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_response_pair_id") REFERENCES challenge_response_pairs ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salt_values" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salt value */,
  "salt_value" TEXT /* Salt value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
